# CrowdfundAfrica

> CrowdfundAfrica is a multilingual, multi-currency crowdfunding platform that connects communities across Africa and the world. It combines African mobile-money payments, live multi-currency conversion, optional blockchain transparency, and community ("village") group fundraising to make raising and donating funds accessible to everyone.

CrowdfundAfrica exists to remove the barriers that keep African communities from raising money for the causes that matter to them: education, health, clean water, infrastructure, agriculture, and disaster relief. Anyone can start a campaign in minutes and receive donations through the payment methods people actually use locally.

## What makes CrowdfundAfrica different
- **African-first payments**: Accepts mobile money (M-Pesa, Orange Money, Wave), local cards, and bank transfers via Flutterwave and Paystack, alongside Stripe for international donors.
- **Multi-currency by default**: Donors give in their currency (USD, EUR, CFA, NGN, KES and 15+ more) with live exchange rates; campaign owners see funds in theirs.
- **Blockchain transparency (optional)**: Campaigns can enable on-chain escrow and public donation logs on Polygon, so donors can independently verify where money goes.
- **Community / village fundraising**: People from the same village or community can co-manage a single campaign and coordinate shared goals like water wells or schools.
- **Truly multilingual**: Full interface in English, French, Spanish, Arabic, and Wolof, with automatic language detection.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://crowdfundafrica.com/): Overview, featured campaigns, and how the platform works.
- [Browse campaigns](https://crowdfundafrica.com/campaigns): Search and filter active fundraising campaigns by category, country, and cause.
- [Start a campaign](https://crowdfundafrica.com/campaigns/create): Create a fundraising campaign.
- [Register](https://crowdfundafrica.com/auth/register): Create a free account.

## Categories
Community, Education, Health, Infrastructure, Disaster Relief, Agriculture.

## Contact
- Website: https://crowdfundafrica.com
- Support: support@crowdfundafrica.com
